title: Software Update - DFU - Turn off the device before starting DFU
scenario: Verify that turning off the device before starting a DFU update prevents the update from proceeding and shows an appropriate error message.
steps: Pair and connect a device with an available update.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update tab.
Tap Continue, then tap Start Update.
expected: Nothing happens; the app remains on the "Software Update" screen. Then, after tapping Continue and Start Update, a popup appears stating "Update currently not available, please try back later". After tapping OK, the popup closes and the user is returned to the "Three Easy Steps" screen.
